description.value: The SQLite/Drizzle-backed implementation of the @bounded-systems/anchored-chain stores.  The pure core defines the ports (RefStore, DerivationStore, AnchoredChainStore) but binds to no database.  This package is where bun:sqlite + drizzle-orm live: it implements those ports ov…
